scope: Desktop Chrome authenticated business-route interaction for UI visual/interaction gate

blockers.evidence: agent.md requires Desktop Chrome wrapper tools for browser smoke and forbids handwritten browser-client/tabs/goto plus login form submission; the wrappers only expose login open/read/claim/list/blank cleanup.
runtime config currently has DESKTOP_SMOKE_TOKEN_ENABLED=false, so /dashboard#codex_smoke_token=<redacted> is not an active accepted path.
Desktop Chrome extension evaluate could read page href/title but window.localStorage was unavailable, so a short-lived JWT could not be injected into the real page session.

non_blockers: JWT signing and backend /auth/me validation passed with the short-lived token.
No interaction.json pass file was written for alerts; capture plan remains interactions=1/28.
remediation_options: Expose an approved wrapped Desktop Chrome action that can set same-origin storage or open an authenticated smoke URL without form submission.
Temporarily enable DESKTOP_SMOKE_TOKEN_ENABLED for an explicit acceptance run, then revert and document the window.
Add a repo-native, non-production smoke callback that accepts only one-time receiver-issued tokens and records evidence without exposing token material.
sensitive_material: No raw JWT, Authorization header, password, or refresh token is stored in this evidence.
